language.label: Language
validator.title: CUP check
validator.intro: cup-check checks lists of CUP codes in the browser without uploading data to external servers. It checks the format and creates an exportable report for review, audit, or reporting.
validator.limitsLead: This check does not replace authoritative sources: read the
validator.limitsTail: to understand what is checked and what remains excluded.
validator.fileHelp: Load one or more CSV/XLSX files, configure CUP columns for each source, and build one batch. Up to 25 MB recommended per file.
validator.textHelp: Paste CUP codes to check, one per line. Empty lines are ignored.
validator.textPlaceholder:
Paste CUP codes here, one per line
Example: A58C15000390001
    B11B15001360001
validator.previewHelp: Normalized batch with original file, sheet, row, and column preserved for each CUP.
validator.limitsP1: This version checks CUP format and, when the static OpenCUP dataset is available, verifies presence in the published mirror.
validator.limitsP2: The tool is under development: it may contain errors, bugs, or incomplete rule interpretations. Results support operations; they are not a certification.
validator.limitsP3: OpenCUP verification uses a monthly database: it may not include the latest issued CUP, unpublished CUP, or records updated after the latest snapshot.
validator.limitsP4: A CUP marked NON_TROVATO_OPENCUP_DA_VERIFICARE may still exist in unpublished projects or projects not yet present in the monthly dataset.
validator.limitsP5: To certify project existence, an authoritative source such as Sistema CUP or OpenCUP is still required.
validator.alertNoCup: No CUP found. Paste at least one code, one per line.
validator.progressLookup: Checking presence in the OpenCUP dataset
dropzone.label: CSV or XLSX file upload
dropzone.errorUnsupported: Load at least one CSV or XLSX file.
dropzone.errorSomeIgnored: Some files were ignored: only CSV and XLSX are supported.
dropzone.warnOneLarge: One file is over the recommended 25 MB: performance may be lower.
dropzone.warnManyLarge: {count} files are over the recommended 25 MB: performance may be lower.
import.title: File import
import.help: Configure each source, then confirm to build one CUP batch.
import.messageNoValuedCup: No valued CUP cells in included sources.
import.messageNoRows: No rows available in included sources.
source.headerManualNo: first row manually treated as data
pdf.title: Extract CUP from invoice PDFs
pdf.intro: Load one or more PDFs to extract CUP codes. Files are processed locally; no data is sent to external servers. For large batches, results appear progressively.
pdf.ocrNoteAfter: in the Source column were extracted with OCR: always check them before using them, because reading errors may produce wrong codes.
xml.title: Extract CUP from XML invoices
xml.intro: Load one or more electronic invoice XML files (FatturaPA) to extract CUP codes. Files are processed locally; no data is sent to external servers.
xml.addedToQueue: {count} XML files added to the queue
tool.pdfExtract.label: Fetch CUP from PDF invoices
tool.pdfExtract.description: Extracts CUP codes from PDF files with text analysis and OCR.
tool.xmlExtract.label: Fetch CUP from XML invoices
tool.xmlExtract.description: Extracts CUP codes from electronic invoice XML files (FatturaPA).
tool.placeholder.label: Coming soon...
